prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划:
2021–2025年物理类最低位次约11097→13886→15926→21009→21502，呈持续后移趋势，近3年累计后移约7600名；2025年基准约21502名，后移速度有所放缓。
2. 【招生计划】本省物理类招生计划2021年28人→2022年32人→2023年40人→2024年46人→2025年58人→2026年54人。2026年较2025年缩招约6.9%，计划人数小幅减少，竞争略有 加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜2026年约第58名，近年排名稳定在50–60区间，属于全国中上游水平；2026年声誉评价为明显负面，主要涉及师 德师风事件，对考生报考心理可能产生一定抑制效应；抖音热度排名第69，评价为一般；地理学A、教育学A、马克思主义理论A等，与物理类招生的地理科学类 、应用心理学等专业直接关联，对相关专业报考有吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等理科热门专业社会热度高热推荐，可能推高相关专业 竞争；湖南省2026年物理类考生约34.7万人，较2025年32.02万人增长约8.4%，考生规模继续扩大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年小幅缩招 约6.9%（加剧竞争）、考生总数增长约8.4%（加剧竞争）及声誉明显负面（抑制报考热度）三方因素，缩招与考生增长共同推高竞争，声誉负面略有对冲。，预测2026年物理类最低位次约20712名，区间20212–21212名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 11097 → 13886 → 15926 → 21009 → 21502, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 7600 positions in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 21502, and the backward speed has slowed down.
2. [Enrollment Plan] The local Physics Category enrollment plan: 2021: 28 → 2022: 32 → 2023: 40 → 2024: 46 → 2025: 58 → 2026: 54. In 2026, compared to 2025, there is a reduction of about 6.9%, a slight decrease in the number of planned spots, leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; on the Soft Science main ranking in 2026, approximately 58th, with recent rankings stable in the 50–60 range, belonging to the upper-middle level nationwide; the 2026 reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly involving teacher ethics incidents, which may have a certain inhibitory effect on candidates' application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking is 69th, evaluated as average; Geography A, Education A, Marxist Theory A, etc., directly related to the Geography Science category, Applied Psychology, and other majors in Physics Category enrollment, attracting candidates for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and other popular science majors have high social heat and are highly recommended, which may increase competition for related majors; in 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Hunan Province is about 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% from 320,200 in 2025, with the candidate scale continuing to expand.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the three factors of a slight enrollment reduction of about 6.9% in 2026 (intensifying competition), a candidate total increase of about 8.4% (intensifying competition), and a clearly negative reputation (suppressing application heat), the enrollment reduction and candidate growth jointly push up competition, while the negative reputation slightly offsets it. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be about 20712, with a range of 20212–21212.

- Physics (Teacher Training)
- Electronic Information Engineering/Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Biological Sciences
- Geographic Sciences
- Energy and Power Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Business Administration
- Food Science and Engineering/Bioengineering
- Environmental Science and Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 20212–21212, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (close to 20212), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 majors such as Computer Science and Technology and Physics (Teacher Training); if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (21212), it is recommended to mainly use Tier 3 majors as safety.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜2026年约第58名，近年排名稳定在50–60区间，属于全国中上游水平；2026年声誉评价为明显负面，主要涉及师德师风事件（副院长婚内 出轨被免职、误挂旭日旗等），对考生报考心理可能产生一定抑制效应；抖音热度排名第69，评价为一般，短视频平台曝光量中等；教育学A、马克思主义理论A 、地理学A、中国语言文学A-、外国语言文学A-，共5个A-/A级学科，师范类学科实力突出，对文科考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 师范/教育类专业社会热度呈分化 观望态势，法学、汉语言/中文等文科专业偏热；湖南省2026年历史类考生约18.7万人，较2025年14.25万人增长约31.2%，考生规模大幅增加，竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年扩招约27.6%（缓解竞争）、考生总数增长约31.2%（加剧竞争）及声誉明显负面（抑制报考热度）三方因素，扩招与考生增长大致对 冲，声誉负面略占上风。，预测2026年历史类最低位次约2711名，区间2304–3118名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category fluctuated approximately 1855 → 2085 → 2042 → 2624 → 2369, showing an overall trend of shifting backward, with a cumulative backward shift of about 500 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 2369; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 51 in 2021 → 47 in 2022 → 39 in 2023 → 44 in 2024 → 29 in 2025 → 37 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees an enrollment expansion of about 27.6%, with the planned number rebounding, easing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 58th on the Soft Science main list in 2026, with recent rankings stable in the 50–60 range, placing it at the upper-middle level nationally; the 2026 reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly involving teacher ethics incidents (deputy dean dismissed for extramarital affairs during marriage, mistakenly hanging the Rising Sun flag, etc.), which may have a certain dampening effect on candidates' application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking 69th, rated as average, with moderate exposure on short video platforms; Education A, Marxist Theory A, Geography A, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Foreign Languages and Literatures A-, totaling 5 A-/A-level disciplines, with outstanding strength in teacher-training disciplines, strongly attracting liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of teacher-training/education majors shows a diverging wait-and-see trend, while law, Chinese language/Chinese literature and other liberal arts majors are relatively hot; in 2026, the number of History Category candidates in Hunan Province is approximately 187,000, an increase of about 31.2% from 142,500 in 2025, with a significant increase in candidate scale, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the three factors of approximately 27.6% enrollment expansion in 2026 (easing competition), approximately 31.2% increase in total candidates (intensifying competition), and clearly negative reputation (dampening application enthusiasm), the expansion and candidate growth roughly offset each other, with the negative reputation slightly prevailing. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be approximately 2711, with a range of 2304–3118.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (close to 2304), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 majors such as Chinese Language and Literature and Law; if your ranking is close to the upper bound of the range (3118), it is recommended to mainly use Tier 3 majors as safety options.
